rows.label: tev056101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev056101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nopopon what he's doing.

rows.label: tev056101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev056101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nopopon if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev056101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Nopopon if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev056101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Nopopon if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Divine Nopopon was curious about
friend's city and deigned to visit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Holy spirits not allowed to meddle
in mortal affairs, so Divine
Nopopon must watch from afar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0003
rows.name:
But Divine Nopopon believes that friend
will bring peace to city one day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0004
rows.name: May you succeed at every nopopportunity![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Somewhere in Mira, friend will find
another creature just as round as
Divine Nopopon. Do not be fooled![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Impostor looks roly-poly, but
has black heart! Friend should
be careful if paths ever cross.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Friend look like friend who wants
to know identity of impostor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0010
rows.name:
But friend must discover this
for self. That is way of world![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Divine Nopopon imagines friend
knows this as well as anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0012
rows.name: May you succeed at every nopopportunity![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ah... Divine Nopopon senses that
friend has already crossed paths
with roly-poly impostor creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0027
rows.name:
But friend need not say another word!
Some things better left unspoken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0028
rows.name:
What matters is that friend
saved Mira from threat. For
that, Divine Nopopon thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0029
rows.name: Friend has done well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0045
rows.name:
Divine Nopopon hears sounds nearby
from that which should not be here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0046
rows.name:
...But it not seem to be doing
bad things. If it merely annoying,
that is probably okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0047
rows.name:
Because of friend, great menace
has been quieted. For that,
Divine Nopopon thanks you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056101_MSG0048
rows.name: Friend has done well.[ST:wait ]
